c.d: Total count of online and offline retailers where the app can find deals and offers
c.s: App store descriptions, official websites, user reviews

c.d: Boolean indicator of whether the app automatically applies available coupons at checkout without manual intervention
c.s: App features, user reviews, official documentation

c.d: Percentage accuracy of real-time price comparisons across multiple retailers for the same product
c.s: Third-party reviews, user feedback, testing reports

c.d: Average time in seconds required to find and display available offers for a searched item
c.s: Performance testing, user experience reviews, app analytics

c.d: Average user rating score from app stores on a scale of 1-5 stars
c.s: Google Play Store, Apple App Store, third-party review platforms
